'''Elshandruu Pica Thundercloud'''<ref name="GG9" /> also known simply as a '''Pica Thundercloud''',<ref name="Hunter">{{StoryCite|story=A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}}</ref> was the name of a popular [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage. The drink was so named because the active ingredients created a fizzy effect which formed a miniature cloud of ionized gas above the glass. The drink was often served in containers that fired tiny microshocks into the cloud to simulate an electrical storm.<ref name="GG9" /> The Elshandruu Pica Thundercloud was considered to be one of the strongest in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], making it highly dangerous.<ref name="SWG">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref> The drink was served at the [[Meltdown Café]] on the planet [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. The [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], [[Spurch Goa]], regularly consumed Pica Thunderclouds wherever he went.<ref name="Hunter" />
